title.en: A hundred extradimensional epochs have passed.

content.en:
A hundred extradimensional epochs have passed.

Ye Tian relied on a large number of second-realm multi-dimensional essences, and finally comprehended the super-dimensional rules to the realm of fifty thousand silks, that is, the five-point realm.

After reaching this realm, his progress in extradimensional rules was extremely slow, and even if he used the second-realm multi-dimensional essence that could improve superdimensional rules, it was still difficult to improve.

If you want to rely on the second-realm multi-dimensional essence of the Duowei treasure bottle imitation to comprehend the super-dimensional rules to the six-point realm, the time it takes is unimaginable.

"This is still my talent far beyond other extra-dimensional realms, and my comprehension is also far surpassing, if I let other extra-dimensional realms comprehend the extradimensional rules, it will be even more difficult!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It can be imagined how difficult it is to cultivate a third realm transcendent realm, any force with a large number of third realms has many secret hole cards and advantages that other forces cannot imagine.

For example, the extradimensional elf clan has the Wood of the Mother Mist, which is an advantage that other forces do not have.

......

this day.

The Tianyang Realm Lord came to find Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, do you want to leave the Six Thousand Territory?"

The Tianyang Realm Lord asked.

"I had the idea. Ye Tian nodded.

The Lord of the Tianyang Realm said: "At present, the permanent passage to leave the Six Thousand Territory is in the hands of twenty top extradimensional forces, and they all have 963 backers behind them, and if we in the Second Realm want to leave the Six Thousand Territory with the help of that permanent channel, we need to pay an unimaginable price, such as working for these forces for a long time, or a large number of resources and treasures. Either way, we don't want to. "

"Tianyang Realm Lord, then how do you want to leave?" Ye Tian asked.

"Escape Alliance!"

The Tianyang Realm Lord said.

"Escape Alliance?" Ye Tian wondered, "This force is only established by some First Realms, could it be that you joined the Escape Alliance, the Lord of the Tianyang Realm?"

"It's not counted!" the Tianyang Realm Lord shook his head, "The Retreat Alliance was indeed only established by some First Realms at the beginning, and these First Realms had no way to leave the Six Thousand Territory with the help of those twenty top extradimensional forces anyway, and they could only rely on themselves if they wanted to leave. Therefore, they wanted to tear a temporary crack out of the weak point of the border extradimensional barrier on the edge of the 6000 Territory and leave. But they still underestimate the boundary extradimensional barrier. Not so long ago, they tried once, and it failed. However, this method is feasible, but it only needs the assistance of those of us in the second realm to hope that we can truly tear apart the weakness of the boundary extradimensional barrier. "

"Will this offend the top extradimensional forces? They control the channels in and out of the 60000 and 5000 territories, resell resources, and if we do, it will be tantamount to cutting off their business. Ye Tian said.

"Not really!" The Tianyang Realm Lord smiled slightly, "The backers behind the Six Capital Boundary Mountain, the Jialan Chamber of Commerce don't care about this, after all, even if it is the Six Thousand Territory, in the eyes of these forces, it is not worth mentioning, the reason why they support some forces here is completely because they have other plans." Although the resources on the side of the 6000 Territory are scarce, sometimes some precious things are born, such as the Boundary Stone of the Extradimensional Domain. Once a lot of precious things are born here, they will be able to take them as soon as possible. If we pay a little price to support a group of forces, we have nothing to lose, and there will be occasional gains, so why not do it! As for other things, they don't care, as long as we don't deliberately offend them, it's not a big problem. "

"Of course, if we do this often, it will definitely not work, so after leaving this time, we can't come back, and don't participate in the Retreat Alliance, the Retreat Alliance wants to do this often, and the second realm has promised them long-term cooperation, which is very risky. "

The Tianyang Realm Lord recounted the details of the situation, as for whether Ye Tian was willing to leave the Six Thousand Territory, it was up to Ye Tian himself.

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, if he wanted to leave the Six Thousand Territory in the future, it would definitely be a very simple matter.

If he didn't want to break through to the third realm in the most perfect way, he could attack the third realm now.

With the cultivation of the third realm (cafe), tearing apart the boundary superdimensional barrier from the 6,000th realm to the 5,999th realm is simply a casual matter.

But if he continued to cultivate slowly like this, if he wanted to raise the extra-dimensional rules of the five-point realm to the seven-point realm, it would take too long a time, and it was not a matter of hundreds of extra-dimensional epochs or thousands of extra-dimensional eras.

"Maybe after leaving the Six Thousand Territory, I hope to get a better opportunity to quickly raise the extradimensional rules!"

Ye Tian thought so.

"Tianyang Realm Lord, I am willing to leave, when will I act?"

The Tianyang Realm Lord said a time, "After ten extradimensional eras, don't inform other forces about this plan, these forces may not necessarily take care of it, but if you tell them, there will definitely be some trouble." "

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded.

...... []

Ye Tian didn't need to make any arrangements when he left the Six Thousand Territory this time, he just let a replica body go over.

However, he wanted to ask if the Lord of the Moon Realm wanted to go over?

"Lord of the Moon Realm, I'm going to let this clone leave the 6,000th Territory and go to the 5,000th Territory, do you want to go over? If you want to go over, I can take you there. "

Ye Tian asked.

"To the territory of 5000?"

The Moon Realm Lord was silent and did not give an answer immediately.

She had escaped from the 5000th Territory, and if she returned, she would not be discovered.

But as soon as she thought of Ye Tian's third-layer Great Realm Armor Technique, she calmed down.

Even in the Blazing Sun Palace, it was impossible to find her traces.

Moreover, her injuries have not been healed, and now she is just maintaining the status quo, and if she wants to recover from her injuries, she can't do it with her current means, and she can't do it on the side of the 6000 Territory, and only by going to the 5000 Territory can she hope to find a treasure to heal her injuries.

"I'm going to the territory of 5000!"

The Moon Realm Lord said.

Since the Lord of the Moon Realm is willing to go, then take it with him.

Moreover, the Lord of the Moon Realm is familiar with the territory of the Five Thousand Thousand, and after passing over, he can quickly become familiar with the situation there, if he doesn't know anything, he can directly ask the Lord of the Moon Realm.

Time passed, and the ten extradimensional epochs gradually passed.

this day.

The Tianyang Realm Lord informed Ye Tian that the action of the Escape Alliance had begun, and asked him to go over immediately.

Swish!

Ye Tian continued to tear apart the extradimensional void, and soon rushed to the location designated by the Retreat Alliance.
